---
title: Quick Start
description: Get up and running with OXWM in minutes
---

import { Callout } from 'fumadocs-ui/components/callout';
import { Step, Steps } from 'fumadocs-ui/components/steps';

Now that you have OXWM installed, let's get your environment set up.

## First Launch

<Steps>
<Step>
**Start OXWM**

If using startx, add to your `~/.xinitrc`:

```sh
exec oxwm
```

Then run `startx`. If using a display manager, select OXWM from the session list.

</Step>
<Step>
**Config is auto-generated**

On first launch, OXWM creates a default config at `~/.config/oxwm/config.lua`.

</Step>
<Step>
**Open a terminal**

Press `Super+Return` to spawn your terminal.

</Step>
</Steps>

## Essential Keybindings

| Binding | Action |
|---------|--------|
| `Super+Return` | Open terminal |
| `Super+D` | Open dmenu |
| `Super+Q` | Kill focused window |
| `Super+Shift+Q` | Quit OXWM |
| `Super+Shift+R` | Reload config |
| `Super+1-9` | Switch to tag 1-9 |
| `Super+Shift+1-9` | Move window to tag 1-9 |
| `Super+J/K` | Focus next/previous window |

<Callout type="info">
All keybindings can be customized in your `config.lua`. Press `Super+Shift+/` to show the keybind overlay.
</Callout>
